name: Cranberry Date Bars
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: TASTE OF HOME - OCT/NOV 95
In a covered saucepan over low heat, simmer cranberries, dates and water for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally until the cranberries have popped. Remove from the heat; stir in vanilla and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine flour, oats, brown sugar, baking soda and salt. Stir in butter until well blended.
Pat half of the mixture into an ungreased 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
Spoon cranberry mixture over crushed dates. Sprinkle with remaining oat mixture.
Gently pat the top.
Bake at 350 degrees for 8 minutes, then bake for another 25-30 minutes or until browned.
Cool. Drizzle glaze over bars. Yield: 3 dozen.
